title: Runtime Control Room
concept: A large live WordPress browser paired with a right runtime inspector that makes version, PHP, language, network, multisite, reset, reload, save, and portability consequences visible on the same active Playground object.
flows: Adjust WordPress version, include older versions, PHP version, language, network access, and multisite settings while reset or saved-site reload consequences remain visible
Save the temporary Playground to a local directory with folder picker, permission grant, progress, selected folder identity, local badge, and reload consequence
Generate and download the active Playground as a zip with source status, progress, completed result, preview status, and transfer history mutation
Export the active Playground to GitHub after account connection and repository selection with progress and transfer history
Start or replace a Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import
Manage saved, local, and temporary Playgrounds with open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, and final fallback state
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, files, blueprint editing, database tools, logs, GitHub export, and zip download without hiding the live browser
featureCoverage: create vanilla WordPress Playground
create from WordPress PR
create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub with account connection
run Blueprint URL
import .zip with replacement confirmation
browse and filter a labeled subset of the 43-entry Blueprint gallery
select featured Blueprint entries and run them
save temporary Playground in browser storage
save to a local directory
show save progress for browser and local destinations
show selected local folder identity and reload permission consequence
browse saved and unsaved Playgrounds
rename a saved Playground
delete a saved Playground with confirmation and fallback state
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh active embedded WordPress page
open Homepage and WP Admin
edit WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
communicate destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
file browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
view, copy, download, validate, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
download database.sqlite
open Adminer and phpMyAdmin
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs
export to GitHub
download active Playground as .zip
record transfer history for GitHub, ZIP, Blueprint, database, and import actions
